questions.question:
Find the sum of the two matrices:
$$\begin{pmatrix} 2 & 3 \\ 1 & 4 \end{pmatrix} + \begin{pmatrix} 5 & -1 \\ 2 & 0 \end{pmatrix}$$
questions.explanation: Add corresponding entries: top-left is 2+5=7, top-right is 3+(−1)=2, bottom-left is 1+2=3, bottom-right is 4+0=4.

questions.question:
Subtract the second matrix from the first:
$$\begin{pmatrix} 6 & 2 \\ 4 & 8 \end{pmatrix} - \begin{pmatrix} 1 & 1 \\ 3 & 5 \end{pmatrix}$$

Find the determinant of the matrix:
$$\begin{vmatrix} 3 & 2 \\ 1 & 4 \end{vmatrix}$$

Multiply the matrices:
$$\begin{pmatrix} 2 & 1 \end{pmatrix} \begin{pmatrix} 3 \\ 4 \end{pmatrix}$$
questions.explanation: Multiply row by column: (2)(3) + (1)(4) = 6 + 4 = 10. Result is a 1×1 matrix (a scalar).

questions.question:
What is the determinant of the matrix:
$$\begin{vmatrix} 5 & 0 \\ 2 & 3 \end{vmatrix}$$

Find the product:
$$\begin{pmatrix} 1 & 2 \\ 3 & 0 \end{pmatrix} \begin{pmatrix} 2 \\ 1 \end{pmatrix}$$
questions.explanation: First row: (1)(2) + (2)(1) = 4. Second row: (3)(2) + (0)(1) = 6. Result is a 2×1 column vector.
